issues.description: Trigger should be 'Activated' with cost/activation type specified. Current trigger is correct but activation context missing.
Missing required condition: LeaderHasType with type 'Water Seven'. The effect only resolves 'If your Leader has the {Water Seven} type'.
Action type 'TrashFromHand' is incorrect. Card text says 'trash this Character' (trash from board/play area), not from hand. Should use appropriate board trash action or clarify self-trash mechanic.
excludeSelf:true contradicts 'trash this Character' - the effect should trash the card itself. This should be true for self-targeting.
Action 'GiveDon' is incomplete. Text requires: add DON from DON deck AND rest it. Missing 'Rest' action in sequence.
Missing 'rest it' action. After adding DON card, must apply Rest action to that DON card.
